---
title: "Swiss HEI Open Data Dashboard"
format:
  dashboard:
    css: ../dashboard-common.css
    expandable: false
author: "Dr Moritz Mähr"
description: "Open data identifiers for Swiss Higher Education Institutions: ROR, OpenAlex, Wikidata, ISNI and more."
date: today
draft: false
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import html

import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import HTML, display

df = pd.read_csv("../naif/hei.csv")

TYPE_ORDER = ["University", "Univ. Inst.", "UAS", "UAS Inst.", "UTE"]
TYPE_LABELS = {
    "University": "Universities",
    "Univ. Inst.": "University institutes",
    "UAS": "Universities of applied sciences (UAS)",
    "UAS Inst.": "UAS institutes",
    "UTE": "Teacher education institutions",
}


def format_identifier(value: object) -> str:
    """Convert IDs to stable strings and remove float artefacts."""
    if pd.isna(value):
        return ""
    text = str(value).strip()
    if not text:
        return ""
    if text.endswith(".0"):
        try:
            numeric_value = float(text)
            if numeric_value.is_integer():
                return str(int(numeric_value))
        except ValueError:
            return text
    return text


def format_plain_text(value: object) -> str:
    """Return plain text values with a fallback dash."""
    text = format_identifier(value)
    return text if text else "-"


def format_identifier_list(value: object) -> str:
    """Render pipe-separated identifier lists with soft wrap points."""
    text = format_identifier(value)
    if not text:
        return "-"
    parts = [html.escape(part.strip()) for part in text.split("|") if part.strip()]
    if not parts:
        return "-"
    return (
        '<span class="dashboard-id-list">'
        + '<wbr><span class="dashboard-id-sep">|</span><wbr>'.join(
            f'<span class="dashboard-id-token">{part}</span>' for part in parts
        )
        + "</span>"
    )


def format_type_label(value: object) -> str:
    """Return the full label for an institution type."""
    text = format_identifier(value)
    if not text:
        return "Unknown"
    return TYPE_LABELS.get(text, text)


def type_order_key(value: object) -> int:
    """Return a stable sort key for institution types."""
    text = format_identifier(value)
    try:
        return TYPE_ORDER.index(text)
    except ValueError:
        return len(TYPE_ORDER)


def make_link(url: str, label: str) -> str:
    """Create a safe external link."""
    return f'<a href="{url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">{html.escape(label)}</a>'


def link_ror(value: object) -> str:
    """Link a ROR identifier."""
    identifier = format_identifier(value)
    if not identifier:
        return "-"
    return make_link(identifier, identifier)


def link_wikidata(value: object) -> str:
    """Link a Wikidata identifier."""
    identifier = format_identifier(value)
    if not identifier:
        return "-"
    if not identifier.startswith("Q"):
        identifier = f"Q{identifier}"
    url = f"https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/{identifier}"
    return make_link(url, identifier)


def link_isni(value: object) -> str:
    """Link an ISNI identifier."""
    identifier = format_identifier(value)
    if not identifier:
        return "-"
    compact = identifier.replace(" ", "")
    return make_link(f"https://isni.org/isni/{compact}", identifier)


def link_crossref_funder(value: object) -> str:
    """Link a Crossref funder identifier."""
    identifier = format_identifier(value)
    if not identifier:
        return "-"
    url = f"https://api.crossref.org/funders/{identifier}"
    return make_link(url, identifier)


def link_geonames(value: object) -> str:
    """Link a GeoNames identifier."""
    identifier = format_identifier(value)
    if not identifier:
        return "-"
    url = f"https://www.geonames.org/{identifier}"
    return make_link(url, identifier)


def display_html_table(dataframe: pd.DataFrame) -> None:
    """Render a dataframe in a scrollable table container."""
    table_html = dataframe.to_html(
        escape=False,
        index=False,
        classes="table table-sm table-striped align-middle",
        border=0,
    )
    display(HTML(f'<div class="dashboard-table-wrap">{table_html}</div>'))


total = len(df)
has_ror = int(df["ror_id"].notna().sum())
has_openalex = int(
    df["openalex_ids"].apply(lambda v: bool(format_identifier(v))).sum()
)
has_wikidata = int(df["wikidata_id"].notna().sum())
```

## Row {height=100%}

### Column {.tabset}

#### About

```{python}
#| echo: false
about_html = f"""
<div class="dashboard-about">
  <div class="dashboard-metrics">
    <div class="dashboard-metric">
      <div class="dashboard-metric-value">{total}</div>
      <div class="dashboard-metric-label">Total HEIs</div>
    </div>
    <div class="dashboard-metric">
      <div class="dashboard-metric-value">{has_ror}</div>
      <div class="dashboard-metric-label">With ROR ID</div>
    </div>
    <div class="dashboard-metric">
      <div class="dashboard-metric-value">{has_openalex}</div>
      <div class="dashboard-metric-label">With OpenAlex ID</div>
    </div>
    <div class="dashboard-metric">
      <div class="dashboard-metric-value">{has_wikidata}</div>
      <div class="dashboard-metric-label">With Wikidata ID</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p>
    Open data identifiers for <strong>{total}</strong> Swiss Higher Education Institutions.
    These identifiers link institutions to external registries and databases such as
    <a href="https://ror.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">ROR</a>,
    <a href="https://openalex.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">OpenAlex</a>,
    <a href="https://www.wikidata.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Wikidata</a>,
    <a href="https://isni.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">ISNI</a>,
    <a href="https://www.crossref.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Crossref</a>, and
    <a href="https://www.geonames.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">GeoNames</a>.
  </p>

  <h5 class="dashboard-subheading" style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">See also</h5>
  <ul>
    <li><a href="../naif/">NAIF Dashboard</a> &ndash; DORA &amp; CoARA adoption</li>
    <li><a href="../tobi/">TOBI Dashboard</a> &ndash; findability and publication counts</li>
  </ul>
</div>
"""
display(HTML(about_html))
```

#### Identifiers

```{python}
#| echo: false
id_df = df[
    [
        "name",
        "short_name",
        "type",
        "town",
        "openalex_ids",
        "openorgs_ids",
        "ror_id",
        "wikidata_id",
        "isni_id",
        "crossref_funder_id",
        "geonames_id",
    ]
].copy()

id_df["short_name"] = id_df["short_name"].apply(format_plain_text)
id_df["type"] = id_df["type"].apply(format_type_label)
id_df["town"] = id_df["town"].apply(format_plain_text)
id_df["openalex_ids"] = id_df["openalex_ids"].apply(format_identifier_list)
id_df["openorgs_ids"] = id_df["openorgs_ids"].apply(format_identifier_list)
id_df["ror_id"] = id_df["ror_id"].apply(link_ror)
id_df["wikidata_id"] = id_df["wikidata_id"].apply(link_wikidata)
id_df["isni_id"] = id_df["isni_id"].apply(link_isni)
id_df["crossref_funder_id"] = id_df["crossref_funder_id"].apply(link_crossref_funder)
id_df["geonames_id"] = id_df["geonames_id"].apply(link_geonames)
id_df["type_order"] = id_df["type"].apply(type_order_key)

id_df = id_df.rename(
    columns={
        "name": "Institution",
        "short_name": "Short",
        "type": "Type",
        "town": "Town",
        "openalex_ids": "OpenAlex",
        "openorgs_ids": "OpenOrgs",
        "ror_id": "ROR",
        "wikidata_id": "Wikidata",
        "isni_id": "ISNI",
        "crossref_funder_id": "Crossref",
        "geonames_id": "GeoNames",
    }
)

id_df = id_df.sort_values(["type_order", "Town", "Institution"]).reset_index(drop=True)

id_df = id_df[
    [
        "Institution",
        "Short",
        "Type",
        "Town",
        "OpenAlex",
        "OpenOrgs",
        "ROR",
        "Wikidata",
        "ISNI",
        "Crossref",
        "GeoNames",
    ]
]

display_html_table(id_df)
```

#### Data Download

```{python}
#| echo: false
download_html = """
<div class="dashboard-download">
  <p>The dataset is maintained in the NAIF Dashboard.</p>
  <div class="dashboard-download-actions">
    <a class="btn btn-primary" href="../naif/hei.csv" download="hei.csv">Download CSV</a>
    <a class="btn btn-secondary" href="../naif/hei.xlsx" download="hei.xlsx">
      Download Excel (.xlsx)
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
"""
display(HTML(download_html))
```
